summary: DYCD attributes the Fiscal 2025 drop in English literacy program participants to a new multi-year contract cycle: awards to providers weren't finalized until partway through the year, new providers needed time to start up, and some providers shifted into a separate pilot program not counted in this total. DYCD's preliminary Fiscal 2026 report shows enrollment recovering as that contract cycle settles in.

sources.label: DYCD, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: increasing overall; a FY25 dip reflected a contract-cycle transition
